notes:
A redesigned region selection:
- The selection box has a fresh look, with corner and edge handles that are easy to grab when resizing.
- The selection now resists crossing a monitor edge, so it is easy to grab a full display. Hold Alt/Option to turn this off.
- The capture toolbar now appears on every monitor while you select a region, not just the one holding your selection.

Other fixes:
- The window picker no longer lists hidden or background windows, such as a browser's closed search bar.
